message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant JCallGraph
participant CliManager
participant MethodCallsList
participant CalledFromList
participant File
participant JarFile
participant ZipEntry
participant ClassParser
participant ClassVisitor
participant Runner

JCallGraph -> CliManager : new CliManager()
JCallGraph -> CliManager : main(args)

JCallGraph -> Runner : getMethodCallsList()
JCallGraph <-- Runner : MethodCallsList

JCallGraph -> File : new File
JCallGraph <-- File : File

JCallGraph -> JarFile : new JarFile(File)
JCallGraph <-- JarFile : JarFile

JCallGraph -> JCallGraph : enumerationAsStream(Enumeration<T> e)
note right : Jar en formato stream

loop forEach
    alt [isDirectory() and getName().endsWith(".class")]
        JCallGraph -> ClassParser : new ClassParser(String, String)
        JCallGraph <-- ClassParser : cp = ClassParser
        JCallGraph -> JCallGraph : getClassVisitor()
        JCallGraph -> ClassVisitor : apply(ClassParser)
        JCallGraph -> ClassVisitor : start()
        JCallGraph <-- ClassVisitor : HashMap<MethodReport, List<MethodReport>>
        alt [!= null]
            JCallGraph -> CalledFromList : add(HashMap<MethodReport, List<MethodReport>>)
        end
        JCallGraph -> Runner : main(String[])
        JCallGraph -> JCallGraph : exportFiles();
    end
end

== catch ==

JCallGraph -> JCallGraph : printStackTrace()

@enduml
```
